background: Homeworld: Capital/Core (Imperial). Frank Chapman is a senior Imperial Intelligence agent with exceptional psionic abilities. Recruited at age 20 after testing revealed PSI-10 rating. Trained at Psionic Institute on Capital for five years. Specialized in diplomatic intelligence and remote sensing operations. Current assignment: Extract Dr. Arnold Rushorin from Solomani space and secure his research on bio-silicon interfaces. Chapman's telepathy makes him extremely difficult to ambush or deceive - he can sense hostile intent from 500 meters away.
education: Imperial Intelligence Academy graduate. Psionic Institute certification. Advanced training in Telepathy and remote viewing.
terms: Agent (Intelligence): Admin-1, Advocate-1, Deception-1. Basic Imperial Intelligence training. Discovered to have exceptional psionic potential. Advanced to rank 1.
Agent (Intelligence): Telepathy-2, Investigate-1, Persuade-1. Psionic Institute training on Capital. Five years of intensive psionic development. Advanced to rank 2.
Agent (Intelligence): Telepathy-3, Clairvoyance-1, Awareness-1, Admin-2. Field operations using psionic abilities for diplomatic intelligence gathering. Advanced to rank 3.

Agent (Intelligence): Telepathy-5, Clairvoyance-2, Deception-2, Investigate-2, Persuade-2. Current assignment: Rushorin extraction. Team leader for Beacher and Yllarra. Can sense SolSec pursuit and hostile intent.
interactions: Expertise: Telepathy (reading thoughts, detecting emotions, sensing life), Clairvoyance (remote viewing), diplomatic intelligence, interrogation resistance, psionic combat
Weaknesses: PSI-10 is rare and valuable - Imperial Intelligence won't risk him unnecessarily, physically average combatant, psi-shield headband is only defense against hostile psionics
Psionic Abilities: Can read surface thoughts within 500m, detect hostile intent automatically, sense 20+ conscious beings in 500m radius, remote view up to 500m with effort (10km maximum)

weapons.name: Neural Disruptor (emergency only)
weapons.traits: Causes INT and DEX damage, illegal most places

equipment.name: Psionic Drug (Psi-Boost)
equipment.traits: +2 to PSI for 1d6 hours, -4 after it wears off

psionic_abilities.name: Telepathy-5
psionic_abilities.effect: Read surface thoughts, detect emotions, sense hostile intent, communicate mind-to-mind

psionic_abilities.name: Clairvoyance-2
psionic_abilities.effect: Remote viewing, see through walls, scout ahead

psionic_abilities.name: Awareness-1
psionic_abilities.effect: Sense danger, enhance perception, detect surveillance

psionic_abilities.name: Life Detection (Telepathy subset)
psionic_abilities.effect: Sense all conscious beings in range, count them, general locations
